positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~taller(X1,X0) | ~taller(X0,X1)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~taller(X0,peter) | taller(X0,michael)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    taller(peter,michael)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~taller(X0,X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~taller(X1,X2) | ~taller(X0,X1) | taller(X0,X2)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~taller(michael,peter)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define man(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_class(X0,X1) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg_problem.tptp_
% SZS output start Proof for neg_problem.tptp_
3. taller(peter,michael) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((taller(X0,X1) & taller(X1,X2)) => taller(X0,X2)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : ((in_class(X0,michael_class) & X0 != michael) => taller(michael,X0)) [input(axiom)]
7. ! [X0,X1] : (taller(X0,X1) => ~taller(X1,X0)) [input(axiom)]
8. ~? [X0] : (in_class(X0,michael_class) & man(X0) & taller(X0,peter)) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~~? [X0] : (in_class(X0,michael_class) & man(X0) & taller(X0,peter)) [negated conjecture 8]
10. ? [X0] : (in_class(X0,michael_class) & man(X0) & taller(X0,peter)) [flattening 9]
12. ? [X0] : (in_class(X0,michael_class) & taller(X0,peter)) [pure predicate removal 10]
14. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (taller(X0,X2) | (~taller(X0,X1) | ~taller(X1,X2))) [ennf transformation 4]
15. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (taller(X0,X2) | ~taller(X0,X1) | ~taller(X1,X2)) [flattening 14]
16. ! [X0] : (taller(michael,X0) | (~in_class(X0,michael_class) | michael = X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
17. ! [X0] : (taller(michael,X0) | ~in_class(X0,michael_class) | michael = X0) [flattening 16]
18. ! [X0,X1] : (~taller(X1,X0) | ~taller(X0,X1)) [ennf transformation 7]
19. ? [X0] : (in_class(X0,michael_class) & taller(X0,peter)) => (in_class(sK0,michael_class) & taller(sK0,peter)) [skolem symbol introduction]
20. in_class(sK0,michael_class) & taller(sK0,peter) [skolemisation 12,19]
21. taller(peter,michael) [cnf transformation 3]
22. ~taller(X1,X2) | ~taller(X0,X1) | taller(X0,X2) [cnf transformation 15]
23. ~in_class(X0,michael_class) | taller(michael,X0) | michael = X0 [cnf transformation 17]
25. ~taller(X1,X0) | ~taller(X0,X1) [cnf transformation 18]
26. taller(sK0,peter) [cnf transformation 20]
27. in_class(sK0,michael_class) [cnf transformation 20]
28. ~taller(peter,sK0) [resolution 25,26]
29. ~taller(michael,peter) [resolution 25,21]
30. ~taller(X0,sK0) | taller(X0,peter) [resolution 22,26]
32. taller(michael,sK0) | michael = sK0 [resolution 23,27]
34. 1 <=> michael = sK0 [avatar definition]
36. michael = sK0 <- (1) [avatar component clause 34]
38. 2 <=> taller(michael,sK0) [avatar definition]
40. taller(michael,sK0) <- (2) [avatar component clause 38]
41. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 32,38,34]
44. taller(michael,peter) <- (2) [resolution 30,40]
45. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 44,29]
46. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 45]
49. ~taller(peter,michael) <- (1) [superposition 28,36]
54. $false <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 49,21]
55. ~1 [avatar contradiction clause 54]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 41]
s2. ~2 [sat_conversion 46]
s4. ~1 [sat_conversion 55]
s5. # [rat s1,s2,s4]
56. $false [avatar sat refutation s5]
% SZS output end Proof for neg_problem.tptp_
% Termination reason: Refutation
